title: School Election 2015, National Study
description: "School Election 2015, National Study" is a national survey (telephone interview) conducted by Sentio Research on behalf of Sikt - Norwegian Agency for Shared Services in Education and Research. The 16 questions included in the survey are some of the same ones that were asked of students in upper secondary school in the School Election Survey 2015. In addition, the survey includes standard background variables. The survey was conducted from August 31 to September 11, 2015. Information about School Elections can be found at the internet address: https://sikt.no/skolevalg
